title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Finolex Industries - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Finolex Industries - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Industries has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Finolex Industries:
Finolex Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Industries!
